problems.name: Iron deficiency anemia
problems.notes: Found on intake screening, age 15. Hgb 10.4, MCV 74, ferritin 8. Treated with oral ferrous sulfate; iron studies normalized by 4/2019. Resolution likely with improved nutritional access after immigration.

problems.name: Latent tuberculosis infection — ruled out
problems.notes: Screening performed at immigration entry visit given father's TB history. QuantiFERON-TB Gold negative. Chest X-ray normal.
